name: egst/emorfiq-scheduler
description: PHP scheduler adapter library with swappable locking backend

suggest.crunzphp/crunz: Required to use the Crunz integration (CrunzScheduler, CrunzStore)
suggest.laravel/framework: Required to use the Laravel integration (LaravelScheduler, LaravelMutex)
suggest.symfony/lock: Required to use the Symfony lock provider (SymfonyLockProvider)
